name: MindReply - Custom Reporting & BI Pipeline
description: Automated custom reports - generates dashboards, exports metrics, sends scheduled reports

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as total_users, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, COUNT(CASE WHEN status='active' THEN 1 END) as active_users, AVG(plan_value) as avg_plan_value FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE

parameters.jsCode:
const metrics = $json; const html = `

Daily Report

Users: ${metrics.total_users}

Revenue: $${metrics.total_revenue}

Active: ${metrics.active_users}

`; return { html, report_date: new Date().toISOString() };
